name: omnifocus
description: Read and manage OmniFocus 4 tasks and projects.

interface.shortDescription: Read and manage OmniFocus 4 tasks and projects.
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex read and manage local OmniFocus 4 tasks, projects, folders, and tags. Supports reading summaries and details, creating and updating items, and organizing tasks with projects and tags.
defaultPrompt: What is in my OmniFocus inbox?
Summarize upcoming due tasks in OmniFocus.
